reviews.review_title: I can now work at a power plant.
reviews.review_description:
I managed to beat the game with no prior experience, no partner, and just guessing. The one problem I have with the game is that it say "escape room" in the title. You should rename it to "Georgia Power Training" or something like that. If you want to go with escape room in the title, add a mode that's actually an escape room for people who don't want to train. 

Overall, an amazing training game. I helps with things such as, teamwork, communication, and knowledge. All I want is for the miscommunications to be fixed.
